channel.title: The Haunted Bicycle
channel.description: The engineering journal of the Skill Weaver project: architecture decisions, testing stories, adaptive assessment research, and deployment lessons.

item.title: Ghosts of Systems Past
item.description: Every good idea leaves behind a ghost, this is ours.
item.author: Manju

item.title: The Great Migration
item.description: It wasn't actually that great, we just moved our services off of DigitalOcean.
item.author: Jesus

item.title: To Gamify Learning
item.description: Using game logic as a powerful tool for learning.
item.author: Bricen
